name: zotero-headless-codex
description: Codex plugin for zotero-headless with MCP access, focused Zotero skills, and research/sync agents.

interface.shortDescription: Search, sync, and manage Zotero libraries from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds the zotero-headless MCP server, a focused Zotero skill pack, Codex-side research and sync agents, and startup health checks so Codex can work effectively across local and remote Zotero libraries.
defaultPrompt: Find related papers on a topic in my Zotero libraries.
Fetch one exact Zotero item and summarize it.
Inspect sync conflicts before pushing remote changes.
